title: Fixed Item Frames
description: Removes the sword texture from item frames and glow item frames.
body:
There is normally a sword texture on an item frame but this texture pack removes it. It looks like the item frame already has a sword on it.
### **BUT**
_"Why does it already has a sword on it?"_

A good topic to research...

You can get help from my [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/gXbxjnpg6M).
